mechanism: CLO OC test breaches at the 7.5% CCC-bucket threshold trigger mandatory cash diversion, removing the marginal bid for B/CCC-rated credits precisely when the maturity wall creates peak refinancing demand. CLO reinvestment period expirations ($250-350B) amplify by removing active management.
regime_dependence: Amplification strongest in sustained-higher-rates regime (SOFR ~5.5%); in a cutting regime (SOFR ~3.5%), CLO arbitrage remains viable and the feedback loop is muted
